ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type (e.g., HeLa, NIH 3T3) */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of the cell (e.g., tumor cell, immune cell, other) */,
  "cell_source" TEXT /* Source of the cell line (e.g., ATCC, lab-grown) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the cell line was derived (e.g., human, mouse) */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state of the cell line (e.g., cancer, healthy) */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the cells are grown (e.g., 37°C, 5% CO2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfection_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfection study */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell type used in the study */,
  "trans_efficiency_class" INTEGER /* Class of transfection efficiency */,
  "transfection_efficiency" REAL /* Measured transfection efficiency */,
  "particle_size" REAL /* Size of the transfection particles */,
  "zeta_potential" REAL /* Zeta potential of the particles */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the transfection protocol used */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used */,
  "transfection_agent" TEXT /* Agent used for transfection (e.g., liposomes, viral vectors) */,
  "transfection_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfection was performed */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the transfection was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfection_studies_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfection_studies_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transfection study */,
  "functional_modification" TEXT /* Description of the functional modification applied */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., genetic, chemical) */,
  "modification_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_modifications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES transfection_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transfection study */,
  "simuli_response" INTEGER /* Response of the cells to stimuli (0 or 1) */,
  "tumor_cell_response" INTEGER /* Response of tumor cells (0 or 1) */,
  "immune_cell_response" INTEGER /* Response of immune cells (0 or 1) */,
  "other_cell_response" INTEGER /* Response of other cells (0 or 1) */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cellular response */,
  "response_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the response (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_responses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES transfection_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transfection study */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., category_1, category_2) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., experimental, control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES transfection_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transfection study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES transfection_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transfection study */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES transfection_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "lab_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory (e.g., research, clinical) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)
